# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent linkerd authz missing.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-http
  namespace: frontend
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-from-ingress
  namespace: frontend
spec:
  server:
    name: frontend-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: ingress-controller
          namespace: ingress-nginx

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-http
  namespace: api-gateway
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-from-frontend
  namespace: api-gateway
spec:
  server:
    name: api-gateway-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: frontend
          namespace: frontend

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: user-service-grpc
  namespace: services
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  port: 9090
  proxyProtocol: gRPC

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: user-service-from-api-gateway
  namespace: services
spec:
  server:
    name: user-service-grpc
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: api-gateway

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: user-service-from-auth-service
  namespace: services
spec:
  server:
    name: user-service-grpc
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: auth-service
          namespace: services

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: auth-service-http
  namespace: services
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: auth-service
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: auth-service-from-api-gateway
  namespace: services
spec:
  server:
    name: auth-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: api-gateway

  namespace: services

    name: auth-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: frontend
          namespace: frontend

  namespace: services

  server:
    name: inventory-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service
          namespace: services

  name: inventory-service-from-api-gateway
  namespace: services

  server:
    name: inventory-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: api-gateway

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: database-proxy-tcp
  namespace: data
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database-proxy
  port: 5432
  proxyProtocol: TCP

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: database-proxy-from-services
  namespace: data
spec:
  server:
    name: database-proxy-tcp
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: user-service
          namespace: services
        - name: order-service
          namespace: services
        - name: inventory-service
          namespace: services

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: redis-cache-tcp
  namespace: data
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: redis-cache
  port: 6379
  proxyProtocol: TCP

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: redis-cache-from-services
  namespace: data
spec:
  server:
    name: redis-cache-tcp
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: auth-service
          namespace: services
        - name: user-service
          namespace: services
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: api-gateway

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: metrics-collector-http
  namespace: monitoring
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: metrics-collector
  port: 9091
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: metrics-collector-from-all-services
  namespace: monitoring
spec:
  server:
    name: metrics-collector-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: frontend
          namespace: frontend
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: api-gateway
        - name: user-service
          namespace: services
        - name: auth-service
          namespace: services
        - name: order-service
          namespace: services
        - name: payment-service
          namespace: services
        - name: inventory-service
          namespace: services
        - name: notification-service
          namespace: services

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: admin-api-http
  namespace: admin
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: admin-api
  port: 8443
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: admin-api-from-admin-only
  namespace: admin
spec:
  server:
    name: admin-api-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: admin-dashboard
          namespace: admin

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: webhook-service-http
  namespace: services
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: webhook-service
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: webhook-service-from-external
  namespace: services
spec:
  server:
    name: webhook-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      unauthenticated: true
    networks:
      - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8
      - cidr: 172.16.0.0/12

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: health-check-http
  namespace: services
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  port: 8081
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: health-check-from-kubelet
  namespace: services
spec:
  server:
    name: health-check-http
  client:
    unauthenticated: true
    networks:
      - cidr: 0.0.0.0/0

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: message-queue-tcp
  namespace: data
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: rabbitmq
  port: 5672
  proxyProtocol: TCP

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: message-queue-from-publishers
  namespace: data
spec:
  server:
    name: message-queue-tcp
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service
          namespace: services
        - name: payment-service
          namespace: services
        - name: notification-service
          namespace: services
        - name: inventory-service
          namespace: services

---

kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: analytics-service-from-tracking
  namespace: services
spec:
  server:
    name: analytics-service-grpc
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service
          namespace: services
        - name: user-service
          namespace: services
        - name: frontend
          namespace: frontend

kind: Server
metadata:
  name: search-service-http
  namespace: services
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: search-service
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: search-service-from-frontend-and-api
  namespace: services
spec:
  server:
    name: search-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: frontend
          namespace: frontend
        - name: api-gateway
          namespace: api-gateway
